title: Recruiter Preferences
description: Optional user- or JD-derived overrides for the versioned recruiter defaults. Safety and job-evidence constraints are intentionally not overrideable.

hire_stage.description: Canonical hire stage or a normalized legacy alias. Resolution stores the canonical value.

excellence_weights.description: Partial non-negative weights. Missing dimensions inherit from the lower-precedence source; the resolved weights are normalized to sum to 1.

pedigree_policy.description: Pedigree may be ignored or used only as positive evidence; it is never a gate.

current_founder_c_suite_for_non_exec_ic.description: Hireability treatment of a current founder or C-suite candidate for a non-executive IC target.
